ham.subject: Out of Office: Rajesh Kumar will be back on 12th May
ham.body:
Hello Team,

Thank you for reaching out. I am currently out of the office traveling for a conference and will not be able to respond to emails until 12th May. I will be back on 13th May and will get back to you as soon as possible.

If you require immediate assistance, please contact my colleague Meera Patel at meera.patel@example.com or call the office line at +91-22-1234-5678.

Best regards,
Rajesh Kumar
Senior Analyst
XYZ Ltd.

spam.subject: Urgent: Your Scholarship Award Awaiting Confirmation
spam.body:
Dear Student,

We are pleased to inform you that you have been shortlisted for the prestigious National Merit Scholarship 2026. Our records indicate that your application is incomplete and requires immediate verification.

To secure your award, please click the link below to confirm your personal details and upload the required documents:

<URL>

Failure to complete the verification within 48 hours may result in forfeiture of the scholarship and potential account suspension.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,
Dr. Anil Gupta
Head of Scholarships
National University
Campus Address: 123 Academic Lane, New Delhi
Phone: +91-11-2345-6789
